creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
That's correct.  I no longer work for MCW, so the smithers.neuro.mcw.edu 
address if defunct.  Many of my future maintainer updates will run into 
this problem.  Is there a standard way around it, or should I just add a 
note to the text of the PR?

Thanks,

    Jason

Beat Gaetzi wrote:
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> Hash: SHA1
>
> Hi,
>
> Your mail address used for this pr doesn't match the MAINTAINER
> variable. I tried to verify that this pr was send by the maintainer but
> the mail bounces. Could you please confirm that your the maintainer of
> this port.
>
> Thanks,
> Beat
>
> - -------- Original Message --------
> Subject: Warning: could not send message for past 4 hours
> Date: Sun, 8 Mar 2009 17:28:56 GMT
> From: Mail Delivery Subsystem <MAILER-DAEMON@marvin.chruetertee.ch>
> To: <beat@FreeBSD.org>
>
>     **********************************************
>     **      THIS IS A WARNING MESSAGE ONLY      **
>     **  YOU DO NOT NEED TO RESEND YOUR MESSAGE  **
>     **********************************************
>
> The original message was received at Sun, 8 Mar 2009 13:11:01 GMT
> from 85-155.78-83.cust.bluewin.ch [83.78.155.85]
>
>    ----- Transcript of session follows -----
> <bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu>... Deferred: Connection refused by
> smithers.neuro.mcw.edu.
> Warning: message still undelivered after 4 hours
> Will keep trying until message is 5 days old
>
>
> - -------- Original Message --------
> Subject: Re: ports/132384: Update port: ports-mgmt/genplist
> Date: Sun, 08 Mar 2009 14:12:06 +0100
> From: Beat Gaetzi <beat@FreeBSD.org>
> To: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
>
> Dear maintainer of ports-mgmt/genplist,
>
> There is a maintainer pr open for your port genplist but unfortunately
> the submitters mail address does not match the MAINTAINER variable.
> Could you please confirm that this pr was raised by you.
>
> Thanks,
> Beat
>
> - --
> Beat Gätzi       | FreeBSD Committer
> beat@FreeBSD.org | http://www.FreeBSD.org
